rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim (selection-based > averaging-based) and the gap statement (heterogeneous sensor contamination) are central to this draft and must be sharp for any 'improvement' to hold; reframing may be required.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain—heterogeneity → contamination → selection rule → ablation confirmation—must be internally consistent; logical gaps here would undermine the improvement regardless of prose quality.
